The '''Vehicle Armored Carrier (VAC)''' was a large [[Dropship/Legends|dropship]] that was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
It was used for deploying the CIS attack vehicles into battle. Because of the lack of weapons, they were easy targets for [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]]. Each one had a pair of folding wings that would fold down when landing.

==History==
VACs were known to be used in the [[Evacuation of Rhen Var|First]] and [[Battle of Rhen Var (Clone Wars)|Second Battles]] of [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]], the [[Conquest of Raxus Prime]], and the [[Battle of Thule]]. They were used in these battles to quickly deposit [[Heavy Artillery Gun]]s, [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]], and other CIS vehicles. They even used their lifts to carry enemy vehicles and destroy them.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]
